name: Picnic Potatoe Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil potatoes in their jackets until tender.
2. Allow the potatoes to cool completely.
3. Peel and chop into large chunks.
4. In a large bowl, mix together mayonnaise, yellow mustard, Louisiana hot sauce, and salt.
5. Add the chopped potatoes and the remaining ingredients (celery, parsley, dill relish, sweet relish, salad olives, onions) to the bowl.
6. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
7. Cover and refrigerate overnight if making ahead of time.
8. Before serving, taste and adjust seasoning as needed. Add a little more dressing if it seems dry.
"Serves 8 Cajuns or 24 other peoples for a good picnic."
From Justin Wilson's "Outdoor Cooking With Inside Help"
